TBA AT THE TBA, MONTREAL, CANADA

48th IEEE Symposium on
Security and Privacy

Sponsored by the IEEE Computer Society's Technical Community on Security and Privacy in cooperation with the International Association for Cryptologic Research

Since 1980, the IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy has been the premier forum for presenting developments in computer security and electronic privacy, and for bringing together researchers and practitioners in the field. The 2027 Symposium will mark the 48th annual meeting of this flagship conference.

The Symposium will be held on TBA, and the Security and Privacy Workshops will be held on TBA. Both events will be in Montreal, Canada at the TBA.

S&P on LinkedIn

Organizing Committee

General Chair Adam Aviv George Washington University
Vice Chair TBA TBA

Gabe Kaptchuk University of Maryland
Posters Chairs Syed Hussain Pennsylvania State University
Wajih Hassan University of Virginia
Test of Time Awards Chair Jeremy Epstein Georgia Tech
Web Chairs Andreas Brüggemann TU Darmstadt
Jan Filipp TU Darmstadt
Publicity Chairs Amit Seal Ami University of South Florida
Prianka Mandal William & Mary

Publications Chairs Berkay Celik Purdue University
Pubali Datta University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
General Chair Emeritus Alina Oprea Northeastern University
